monitor_the_situation.title: — S3 · Conflict · Tel Aviv, Israel · 1h ago. A hand grenade exploded at a luxury residential complex in north Tel Aviv, causing property damage but no casualties reported.
Israeli Army Blows Up Homes in Southern Lebanon
— S3 · Conflict · Southern Lebanon, Lebanon · 3h ago. Israeli forces blew up homes in southern Lebanon, targeting Hezbollah-linked structures.
Iran Launches Ballistic Missiles at US Facilities in Bahrain and Kuwait
— S3 · Conflict · Manama, Bahrain · 5h ago. Iran's IRGC launched ballistic missiles at US military facilities in Bahrain and Kuwait, part of an escalating conflict with the United States.
